display.purpose: Post titles and page heroes. clamp(34px,6vw,52px), weight 600, tracking -0.025em. One per page.

headline.purpose: Major section openers. clamp(30px,5vw,40px), weight 600, tracking -0.02em.

title.purpose: Story card titles and article h2. clamp(22px,3vw,28px), weight 600.

subhead.purpose: Article deks and section intros. 18px, lh 1.5.

eyebrow.purpose: Section kicker above a headline. clamp(18px,2vw,22px), weight 500.

body.purpose: Interface copy at 15px, lh 1.7. Article prose stays 15px, lh 1.7.

footnote.purpose: Nav links, captions, secondary rows. 13.5px, lh 1.55.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked terminal labels and meta lines. 12px, tracking 0.14em, prefixed // or $.

code.purpose: Code blocks and inline code. Same Geist Mono as the rest of the site, on a bordered black panel.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: The system is flat. Nothing is shadowed at rest or on hover. Depth comes from 1px hairlines, never shadow.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: focus-visible ring (2px solid ink at 70%, 3px offset) on every interactive element.

motion.name: ease-house
motion.purpose: The One Curve Rule. Ease-out-expo on every transition on the site.

motion.name: ease-curtain
motion.purpose: Sanctioned exception, mobile nav flyout curtain only.

motion.name: duration-nav
motion.purpose: Nav and chrome transitions, hamburger morph.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-entry reveal, opacity 0 to 1 plus 12px rise, plays once.

motion.name: caret-blink
motion.purpose: Blinking block caret on the home hero (oak-caret).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: White block CTA. White fill, black text, inverts to bordered-black on hover. Sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f5f5f5; color: #000000; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid #f5f5f5; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #000000; color: #f5f5f5; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Bordered terminal button. Transparent fill, hairline border brightens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #f5f5f5; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #f5f5f5; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: CTA Text Link
components.description: Mono learn-more link. White text, trailing arrow nudges right on hover, underline on hover.
components.css: .ds-link-cta { color: #f5f5f5; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13.5px; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 4px; } .ds-link-cta:hover { text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-link-cta:hover .ds-link-cta-arrow { transform: translateX(2px); } .ds-link-cta-arrow { display: inline-block; transition: transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-link-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Global Nav
components.description: Solid black bar, 48px, hairline bottom border (never transparent or frosted). Pixel cursor mark plus ege wordmark, quiet mono links, GitHub text link and white RSS button on the right.
components.html:
ege
BlogProjectsAboutBooks
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; height: 48px; padding: 0 24px; background: #000000; border-bottom: 1px solid #404040; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: #f5f5f5; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-mark { width: 20px; height: 20px; background: #f5f5f5; image-rendering: pixelated; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 13.5px; color: #a0a0a0; text-decoration: none; padding: 4px 8px; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link-active { color: #f5f5f5; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Story Card
components.description: Bordered terminal tile. Sharp corners, hairline border, fill stays black, border brightens on hover. Optional bordered media, uppercase tracked label, title, summary, date.
components.html:
// folio

Folio - who said what

On-device transcription and diarization, no cloud.

JUNE 9, 2026
components.css: .ds-story { display: block; max-width: 420px; background: #000000; border: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 240ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-story:hover { border-color: #5a5a5a; } .ds-story:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-story-media { height: 180px; background: #000000; border-bottom: 1px solid #404040; } .ds-story-well { padding: 20px; } .ds-story-label { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #787878; } .ds-story-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.015em; color: #f5f5f5; margin: 12px 0 8px; } .ds-story-summary { font-size: 13.5px; line-height: 1.55; color: #a0a0a0; margin: 0 0 16px; } .ds-story-date { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #787878; }

components.name: Post List Row
components.description: Terminal archive table. Hairline row dividers, prompt caret on hover, title left, uppercase tracked date right. Year groups use a // label.
components.html: ears without eyesMAY 2026i cloned my advisory boardAPR 2026
components.css: .ds-archive { max-width: 560px; border-top: 1px solid #404040; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-archive-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 24px; padding: 14px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #404040; text-decoration: none; } .ds-archive-row:hover .ds-archive-title { text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; } .ds-archive-title { font-size: 13.5px; color: #f5f5f5; } .ds-archive-date { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #787878; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-archive-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Segmented Filter
components.description: Terminal tab row. Bordered options, sharp corners, the selected one inverts to white-on-black. Monochrome, never colored.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: inline-flex; border: 1px solid #404040; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-seg-opt { background: transparent; color: #a0a0a0; font-size: 13.5px; padding: 6px 14px; border: none; border-right: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-seg-opt:last-child { border-right: none; } .ds-seg-opt:hover { color: #f5f5f5; } .ds-seg-opt-selected { background: #f5f5f5; color: #000000; } .ds-seg-opt:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Bordered terminal field with a dim prompt prefix. Sharp corners, hairline border, white focus ring.
components.html: $ grep
components.css: .ds-search { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #000000; border: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 0; padding: 0 12px; width: 280px; } .ds-search:focus-within { outline: 2px solid rgba(245, 245, 245, 0.7); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-search-prompt { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13.5px; color: #787878; } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; background: transparent; color: #f5f5f5; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13.5px; padding: 10px 0; border: none; outline: none; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #787878; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Read-progress bar (books detail, reading progress). Solid white fill in a hairline track, sharp corners. No block glyphs.
components.css: .ds-bar { height: 10px; width: 260px; border: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 0; } .ds-bar-fill { height: 100%; background: #f5f5f5; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Code and terminal panels. Bordered black panel, optional uppercase title bar, Geist Mono throughout. Sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-code { margin: 1.6em 0; border: 1px solid #404040; border-radius: 0; background: #000000; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-code-title { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #948f82; padding: 0.55rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #242427; } .ds-code-pre { margin: 0; padding: 1rem; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.65; color: #ece8dc; overflow-x: auto; }

narrative.overview: A terminal does one thing per line and never raises its voice. This system rebuilds chele.bi the way oak.space builds its site: a solid black screen, one monospace family, off-white text, 1px hairlines for every boundary, and motion that states a fact and stops. It is a deliberate, one-to-one homage to oak.space, personalized for Ege Çelebi. Migrated June 2026 from the previous Apple-faithful system: white-and-blue and the system font stack are gone, replaced by pure black, Geist Mono, sharp corners and monochrome ink. The blog still reads like longform writing; every surface now reads like a developer's terminal.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome. Pure black #000000 and off-white #f5f5f5 with two grays of ink and two of line. No chroma anywhere except project logos and photography.
One family, Geist Mono, on everything. Sans equals mono. A second family is prohibited.
Zero border-radius. Every corner is sharp. Pills and rounded cards are retired.
Flat. No shadows at rest or on hover. Structure comes from 1px hairlines, never elevation.
Dark only. There is no light mode and no theme switcher; the canvas is always #000000.
Terminal motifs: // section labels, $ command prompts, middot meta lines, uppercase tracked eyebrows, a pixel cursor mark, a blinking block caret.
Shared primitives first. Pages compose Nav, Footer, Story Card, Post List Row, Segmented Filter, Search Input, Gallery and the prose surface before inventing anything.

rules.name: The Solid Black Rule
rules.body: Every surface is #000000. Cards, panels, the modal, code blocks and section bands all share the page canvas. There are no gray fills; separation is a 1px #404040 hairline. If a boundary is unclear, draw a line, never tint the background.

rules.name: The Monochrome Rule
rules.body: The palette is black, off-white and grays only. Links, focus, buttons and accents are all ink, never a hue. Project logos and cover art are the only saturation on any page.

rules.name: The Zero Radius Rule
rules.body: border-radius is 0 everywhere. No pills, no rounded cards, no rounded inputs. Sharp corners are the brand.

rules.name: The Flat Rule
rules.body: Nothing is shadowed at rest or on hover. Depth and hierarchy come from hairlines and spacing. The only sanctioned blur is the mobile nav curtain and the dialog backdrop.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono everywhere, with JetBrains Mono and the system mono stack as fallback. Sans resolves to mono. A third family is prohibited.

rules.name: The Semibold Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No weight above 600. Geist Mono ships 400, 500, 600. Emphasis beyond semibold comes from size and from the white-on-black inversion.

rules.name: The Tracked Label Rule
rules.body: Eyebrows, meta lines and column headers are 12px, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.14em, ink-mute, prefixed with // for sections or $ for commands. Body and headings stay tight and sentence case.

rules.name: The One Curve Rule
rules.body: Every transition uses cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), ease-out-expo. The single exception is the mobile nav curtain at cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1). No springs, bounce or elastic.

rules.name: The Play Once Rule
rules.body: Scroll reveals are a single fade plus 12px rise, 700ms, once per page load. Render the final state immediately under prefers-reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Dark Only Rule
rules.body: The theme is forced dark. There is no light mode, no system following and no theme switcher. Never introduce a light surface.

rules.name: The Article Column Rule
rules.body: Article prose stays within the 720px column. Interface rows cap at the 1120px frame.

rules.name: The 44 Point Rule
rules.body: Every interactive element presents a hit area of at least 44px by 44px, gained through padding, never visual size.

dos: Do take values from this file literally. #000000 means #000000, #f5f5f5 means #f5f5f5, 0 radius means 0.
Do keep every surface solid black and separate sections with 1px #404040 hairlines, not gray bands or shadows.
Do set everything in Geist Mono and keep weights at or below 600.
Do use the terminal motifs: // section labels, $ prompts, middot meta lines, uppercase tracked eyebrows.
Do use cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for every transition and play scroll reveals once.
Do keep blog posts as the MDX files they are today. The redesign touches mdx-components.tsx, never the posts.
Do compose new pages from Story Card, Post List Row, Segmented Filter, Search Input, Gallery and the prose surface before inventing anything.
Do render the final state immediately under prefers-reduced-motion, and give every control a 44px hit area.
donts: Don't add any chroma. No blue, no accent hue, no gradient text. Links and focus are ink, not color.
Don't use border-radius. No pills, rounded cards, rounded inputs or rounded images.
Don't add shadows, glassmorphism beyond the nav curtain and dialog backdrop, or gray surface fills. Black plus hairlines only.
Don't introduce a light mode, a theme switcher or a second font family.
Don't use weights above 600 or a non-mono typeface.
Don't draw a tinted band to separate sections; use a hairline.
Don't render solid bars or block art with block glyphs (Geist Mono's full block gaps); use a CSS fill bar instead.
Don't add springs, bounce, parallax, scroll-scrubbing or re-triggering reveals.
Don't reference music or Spotify; that surface was removed.
Don't ship a modal where an inline treatment works.
